What are the dates/months for Aries?You have an Aries Sun sign if you were born from approximately March 21st to April 20th. However, the start and end dates vary from year to year, so if you were born around the start or end date of a sign, be sure to check your sign here:What is my Sun Sign? – Calculatorfor a definitive answer.

Building your resources is in focus in May, dear Aries, but as the month progresses, a growing theme centers on communicating and connecting. You’re seeking more predictability in your life this month while keeping busy. The Full and New Moons can nudge you toward better spending habits and more faith and confidence in your ability to take care of yourself. You’re in a good place for finding a balance between work and play.

May begins and ends with a Full Moon! The first one can bring a financial or intimate matter to a turning point. If you’ve been dependent on a situation, person, or habit, you now recognize a need to detach. You’re now awake to your situation. Settling debt, receiving money or credit, a shuffling of money sources, or a surprising relationship development are possibilities now.

The month ahead is strong for self-development, personal strength, and initiative, dear Taurus. You have a greater desire to be independent and take care of your own needs in May.

May is a power period for you, and you very often feel in charge. Even so, Mars remains in the sign just behind yours until the 18th, and while the Sun and Mercury are grabbing you some attention until then, you are not moving full-speed ahead just yet. You need some time to process things before making the big decisions! Relationships can require extra care around the Full Moon on the first day of the month, but it's also a time of increased self-awareness. This Full Moon delivers great lessons and insights.

Until June 21st:The Sun continues to move through your solar first house. You experience a renewal of energy and vitality now, and it's a strong time for increased personal confidence. The emphasis is on self-expression, what kind of impression you make on others, and beginning new personal projects.You are a little more self-centered than usual, and this is quite natural and healthy as long as you don't take it too far. You are more decisive and forward-looking now, and you put more faith in your own abilities. Physically, you are likely feeling strong. This is an excellent cycle for making personal changes in your manner or appearance, and for any self-improvement endeavors. Personal projects that you begin now are likely to blossom nine months down the road.From June 21st forward:The Sun highlights your second house now, and your focus is on material affairs and comfort issues. Security is a driving force for you at the moment, and you might find that you are especially interested in accumulating possessions. What you have and what you don't have come into focus--what makes you feel comfortable, your sense of security, and what you value.This is the time of year when personal finances and possessions receive maximum attention. Pour your energy into your work and your finances, and you might just be able to take your ideas to the bank.Extravagance with your pocketbook is something you may want to look out for, however. If you find yourself itching to make unnecessary purchases, know that at the root of this urge is the desire to pamper and comfort yourself. Nothing wrong with it, but there are inexpensive (and even free) ways to make yourself feel good.This is not the most eventful time of year for you. You are more inclined to dig in your heels and hang on to what makes you feel most secure than to take big risks.Venus this Month: Love, Romance, Social Life, Comfort, PleasureUntil the 13th:Venus continues to grace your solar second house during this period. You might receive gifts or bonuses now, or you find much comfort in what you already own and have. You may be a little extravagant with money for the time being, as your desire for luxury and comfort items is increased now, and this is something to watch for. When it comes to love, you value those who make you feel comfortable and secure.From the 13th onward:With Venus moving through your solar third house during this period, you are mostly cheerful in your approach to others, and perhaps somewhat intellectual, during this transit. Essentially, you are quite companionable now. You enjoy talking about what interests you, and you find great value in the exchange of ideas. Sometimes this transit brings benefit through siblings, communications, or short trips. During this period, you are most attracted to wit, cheerfulness, and verbal rapport. You are especially good at mediating conflicts. Smoothing over differences using your diplomacy skills figures now.Mercury this Month: Communications, Learning, Connections, TransportationFrom the 1st onward:With Mercury in your solar second house, this is a strong period for analyzing your cash flow, income, and earning power. You are more practical and rational in your approach to finances during this period. With your conscious mind focused on money and possessions, as well as personal values, this can be a strong period for gathering new money-making ideas.Alternatively, it could be a time when you tend to fret over your finances. Conversations tend to be practical rather than frivolous now. Financial gain may come through communications.Mercury is retrograde from June 29th to July 23rd:All Mercury retrograde cycles particularly affect you in terms of your personal presentation or image to others and communications with family because Mercury rules these areas of your life. Because Mercury is your sign's ruler, all of the common Mercury Retrograde issues may apply. Put off making important decisions with regards to family and domestic matters (Virgo-ruled for you) just now, and take care when it comes to communicating with family members.Occurring in your solar second house this time, extra care should be exercised when it comes to new financial initiatives. There may be the need to revisit old, nagging issues regarding personal finances. Take this time to re-budget instead of making premature purchases. Hold off on major decision-making regarding money. Instead, take the time to re-think your sources of income and how you spend your cash during this period, but put off finalizing anything important for the time being. In fact, some money-making ideas or ventures may be put on hold due to circumstances beyond your control. This is an excellent period for review, however.Mars this Month: Energy, Drive, CourageUntil the 28th:Mars continues to energize your solar twelfth house now. While Mars occupies the twelfth house, asserting yourself in a direct and straightforward manner can be difficult. This is largely due to a feeling of not being in touch with what it is you want or desire just for the time being as you reassess your goals and needs.This lack of direction and self-knowledge should prompt you to look within to learn about your desires. It is likely that you will be much clearer when Mars reaches your first house. For the time being, take some time for rest and give your ego a break.From the 28th onward:You are able to stand your ground and assert yourself more than usual during this transit of Mars through your solar first house. You have energy at your disposal to move your plans forward, and you are more enterprising. You want to leave your mark on the world in some way--however big or small--and you are more able to make an impression than usual. If circumstances are such, you are able to easily fight back. In fact, you may be somewhat combative under this influence, and you may have a short temper.Avoid being pushy. Take charge of your life, but don't bulldoze over others in the process! This is an excellent transit for assertiveness and physical vitality. Love affairs may also be stepped up during this period. On the rare occasion when an accident occurs, it is more likely to involve the head or face.Overview Horoscope:See ourTime Line Forecast reportfor a personalized forecast for the year ahead.Get your uniquePersonalized Horoscopefor the year ahead—over 100 pages long—for a detailed guide to your best days and your most challenging days for attracting love, career success, communication, and more.Know More About Yourself and OthersTry Cafe Astrology's in-depthbirth chart reports,relationship reports,future forecasts, andmore.Love & Romance Forecast ReportLove outlook for the year ahead. The month ahead brings a strong focus on your happiness goals, friendships, and associations, dear Cancer. It also offers a powerful time for taking care of unfinished business, as well as for healing, relaxing, and getting in touch with your inner world.

May opens and ends with a Full Moon! The Full Moon on the 1st can usher in an important realization about a romance or special project as it occurs in your solar fifth house. Listen to your intuition about a matter, even if it comes on suddenly and surprises you.

There can be some struggles with difficult people or competition, especially around the 4th. Otherwise, you're in good shape for taking charge of longer-term goals and connecting with your ambition.

Your responsibilities are a major focus in May, dear Leo, but your happiness goals and social life are also strong themes. With the Sun at the top of your solar chart in your career sector until the 20th, it's a time for making real progress on achieving your goals. Venus and Mars in harmony with your sign until the 18th help round out your experiences socially and mentally. Your month looks very full, and it’s likely to be both engaging and pleasant.

The month ahead holds mixed energy but mostly balanced, dear Virgo. You're paying particular attention to your need for life experience and spirited activities, as well as your career or responsibilities. As you divide your time well, you’re set to gain something valuable in all areas.

You enjoy some real enthusiasm and a desire for new ideas this month. You may be adding varied activities to your daily routines. Career and reputation matters can be a satisfying area of focus and become increasingly important to your sense of well-being as May advances.

May brings an emphasis on relationships, observation, and the breaking of routines for you, dear Libra. Exciting developments in a partnership or your relationships, in general, can figure strongly as well. You’re seeking more substance in your projects and pastimes.

Full Moons bookend the month. The Full Moon on the 1st awakens your need to attend to money, resources, and ownership matters. Epiphanies occurring now help you see where change is needed. There can be revelations and unveilings centered around valuables, values, talents, sharing of responsibilities, and power dynamics. For example, there may be some scrambling for resources, records, and information, or there can be money (or money news) coming in. The Full Moon on the 31st is more about communicating and connecting.

Pluto begins its yearly retrograde cycle on the 6th, and it will remain retrograde until mid-October. With this shift, there can be a temporary magnification of problems, complications, and fears related to those areas of your chart strongly influenced by Pluto: romance, creativity, recreation, finances, and security. Pressures will subside going forward, and in fact, you’ll reach the point where you’re significantly detached enough to gain a better perspective on these things. This way, you can more clearly see where fear and over-attachment may have worked against you. It's the beginning of a powerful period for self-knowledge.

The month ahead can bring a strong focus on relationships, dear Scorpio, and you're also going hard with your routines, pursuit of wellness, and daily affairs. You can be especially involved with others in May, and for the most part, your involvement is pleasant and rewarding, if occasionally demanding. All month, your partnership sector is busy, making it a fine time to redefine relationships or your relationship needs. Harmonizing and connecting seem to be the most important factors for reaching your goals at this time of year.

May begins and ends with a Full Moon! The Full Moon on the 1st occurs in your sign, prompting personal epiphanies. Your feelings are coming to full bloom. It’s a time when things come to light about you, and if you want certain things to gain exposure, this can be the time. You could be putting an attachment behind you and embracing the joy of independence, or improving a current relationship by improving your self-reliance. This is a time to recognize the need for positive change.

Pluto begins its retrograde cycle on May 6th, positioning you well to review, reassess, and gain a new perspective about areas of your chart strongly influenced by Pluto: your personal goals, personality, security, comfort, family, and home or domestic life. Some related plans may need adjustment, but you might find it easier to detach from pressures and fears in these areas. You’ll soon find this process more comfortable as you grow more accustomed to this energy that's with you until the middle of October.

Sagittarius datesare approximately from November 22 to December 21. However, it’s important to note that all Sun sign dates are approximate since they change from year to year. In other words, they’re dependent on your birth year, and in some cases, birth time. May is likely to be busy and at times hectic, dear Sagittarius, but also quite excellent for making corrections and connections. You’re in fine shape for special attention to your health and work. After the New Moon on the 16th, you’re especially ready to take charge. Self-improvement is in strong focus.

The month begins and ends with a Full Moon! On the 1st, there can be an important realization about rest, relaxation, or true feelings about a matter. The need to pull yourself back from the routine is likely now. It’s not the time to make sweeping decisions, however. Instead, this is a time to recognize your feelings, instincts, and hunches, and then gradually let an improvement plan unfold. You’re receiving powerful messages from your hunches and intuition, and feelings about a past issue are now undeniable. The Full Moon on the 31st is all about you.

May brings a stronger emphasis on your personal life, family, home, work, health, entertainment, and romance, dear Capricorn. You're discovering ways to enjoy and express yourself more fully — May is a strong month for connecting with your heart. As the month advances, you do pick up the pace with work and health routines. In the meantime, your romantic and creative worlds often take center stage.

However, while you're getting the introspection and downtime you need, you're also finding many ways to enjoy and express yourself. There may be a surprising new attraction, craving, or interest.

The month begins with a Full Moon, and ends with another one! The Full Moon on the 1st brings your need to perform, accomplish, and excel to the fore, while the final Full Moon in May is about your need for friendship and camaraderie.

May brings a strong focus on connecting, learning, transportation, communications, and daily affairs, dear Pisces. You’re also likely to enjoy your home and personal life more fully this month. You have a stronger desire than usual to communicate and connect, and siblings, relatives, or neighbors tend to play a more vital role in your life. Your curiosity and need for variety can lead to a busy pace. There is much to deal with in the short term, but you can also find time for long-term vision and planning.

The month begins and ends with a Full Moon! Around the Full Moon on the 1st, sudden interests can lead you along a new path. Be choosy about what you take on now, but listen to your feelings and hunches. Something comes to light that changes your perspective and focus, elevating your concerns beyond the routine. It can encourage you to look at the big picture or to reach higher and wider. Consider that your needs for variety, independence, and freedom are key, and that understanding them is better than letting them rule your decisions. The Full Moon on the 31st is a call to perform, advance, or attend to your responsibilities.

You are communicative and sociable, reaching out to others and enjoying the connections you’re making in May. There’s likely to be an emphasis on learning, particularly self-taught or home-learning endeavors. Later in May, there is a stronger desire to enjoy the peace and security of family life, however, and far less interest in venturing too far from home.
